blocks.content: 20 minutes earlier.
After escaping from the glass chamber in the isolation room, Garas attempted to mate with every creature there.
This event aligned perfectly with Plu's intentions, but there was one overlooked fact.
Even Plu, who knew how terrifying Garas was, couldn't accurately gauge its reproductive drive.
Having been confined in a narrow glass chamber for days, Garas was in an extremely anxious state, and its reproductive drive upon gaining freedom was 200,000 times that of a human.
The period for the genetic information Garas injected into other species to grow from embryo to adult was typically 14 hours.
However, driven by the urgency of passing on its genes, the birthing time was reduced to just 3 seconds.

blocks.speaker: Garas
blocks.content: Kiaaa! Kiaaa!
As the giant creature let out a laborious scream, dozens of Garas burst from its belly.
The wriggling offspring grew into adults within 10 seconds and attacked other creatures.
It was literally exponential.
Garas's offspring were born in every apartment unit, and soon the isolation room reached its capacity.
With a loud bang, the iron door flew open, and Garas of all shapes and sizes flooded the corridor like water bursting from a dam.
The creatures, forming a torrent, collided at the corridor intersections and, following the principles of fluid dynamics, began spreading throughout the entire command center.

blocks.speaker: Garas
blocks.content: Huff! Huff!
The corridor Garas had swept through was left with only the gruesome remains of its victims.
Only the bald man who had been attacked by Garas was left, leaning against the wall, gasping for breath.
His belly was swollen as if filled with fluid, and the bloating was increasing at a rate of more than twice per second.

blocks.speaker: Bald Man
blocks.content: Huff! Huff!
His trembling hand grasped a dagger on the floor.
Lifting it with both hands, he reversed his grip and aimed it at his own belly, his face contorted with fear.

blocks.speaker: Bald Man
blocks.content: Ugh!
He had to stab himself. It was the best choice he could make for himself.
But in the end, the man grimaced and threw the dagger away.

blocks.speaker: Bald Man
blocks.content: Aaaargh!
As his belly exploded, a black creature, curled up, spilled out.
When its bent spine fully extended, it reached a length of 1 meter. It supported itself on the floor with its thin arms and backward-bent legs, sticking out its long tongue.
Its face was distorted as if struck by a hammer, it had no eyes, and its brain was exposed on top of its head.

blocks.speaker: Garas
blocks.content: Kikiki!
Garas, prowling like a cheetah, detected the scent of a living creature with its keen sense of smell.

blocks.speaker: Garas
blocks.content: I… am… the king of the species.
Crack!
With four cracks in the floor, Garas's body disappeared.
Shirone and Plu ran down the corridor without daring to look back.
No matter where they went, Garas was there, and they could feel their escape routes narrowing.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Senior! What do we do? We're going to be surrounded at this rate.
A horde of Garas appeared in their path.
Plu stopped and swung Phoenix, sending a vortex of fire forward.

blocks.speaker: Garas
blocks.content: Kiaaa! Kiaaa!
The heat melted Garas's skin like porridge.
But soon, the wounds began to regenerate with Kenser's ability.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Damn! Regeneration this time?
Garas wasn't inherently a strong creature.
But its bizarre reproductive ability, capable of producing offspring within 10 seconds, combined with the environment of a lab filled with various isolated creatures, had created an absurd species.
As the number of individuals exploded in the confined space, some mutations even attempted to breed with their own kind, making Garas stronger and more evolved.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He could tell what kind of creatures Raycis had collected just by looking at Garas's form.
I'll handle this.
An umbra formed before Shirone's eyes, crushing the charging Garas.
He had learned that umbra was effective against Kenser's traits, but it was just luck.
Every creature had a natural enemy, and Garas, thriving in an environment with infinite mutations, was becoming increasingly dangerous the longer they delayed.

blocks.speaker: Garas
blocks.content: Kirik! Kirik!
Mucus dripped from the ceiling, transforming into dozens of sacs that hung down.
As the eyes that emerged from the sacs activated Antithesis, the two were immobilized.

blocks.speaker: Garas
blocks.content: Ugh!
At the same time, a transparent Garas with the abilities of the invisible ghost Hororos bit Plu's calf.
Seeing the clear bite marks on her white skin, Shirone heightened his mental transcendence and counterattacked.
He crushed the snake-like transparent Garas with his tendrils and fired Photon Cannons at the ceiling, causing the walls to collapse and block the exit.
Without time to think about the aftermath, Shirone checked on Plu.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Senior, are you okay?
Plu looked at her bleeding leg. She could still move.

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: But seeing Garas grow stronger by the moment, she had already made up her mind.

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: I'll lure them away. You go find Raycis. If we don't stop her, the mission fails.
Shirone couldn't respond.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He knew it was the only option, but leaving Plu as Garas's prey was unbearable.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Senior, I…

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: Hurry! You promised me! We agreed not to hesitate when we had to make a choice!
Shirone clenched his fists and shouted.
Slap!
Shirone's head turned with the sound.

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: Go. You can do it. You know that, right?
Shirone wasn't hurt. The pain in his chest was far greater than the sting on his cheek.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Take down Raycis. Then come back for me.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Both knew that wouldn't happen.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That fact was what saddened Shirone the most.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The longer you hesitate, the less time you'll have to save me. If you come back and find I died 5 seconds earlier, could you bear it?

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: Senior.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Two seconds have passed.
Shirone closed his eyes tightly and stood up. For the first time in his life, he lied to someone about their fate.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'll definitely come back.
Shirone pushed off the ground and ran, turning the corner.
Almost simultaneously, a horde of Garas came charging from the other side.

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: Plu was no longer afraid.

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: Instead, she felt a sense of relief from sending Shirone away, and her expression was more serene than ever.

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: Thank you. You're a good kid.
A dry smile formed on her lips.

blocks.speaker: Plu
blocks.content: Goodbye, Shirone.
Plu stood up, gripping Phoenix, her expression fiercer than ever.
Smoke rose from her body as if she were about to explode.
Amplifying her magic to the point where she didn't care if she burned herself, she extended Phoenix.
It was the most powerful magic possessed by Plu, an officially certified 8th-grade mage.
Hellfire!
The blazing flames filled the corridor like a cloud.
Tears wouldn't stop flowing from Shirone's eyes.
But the sorrow that felt like it would crush his chest turned into cold anger as he reached the lab with the Fuzix Machine.
With eyes that could cut through steel, Shirone glared at the lab and slowly opened the door.
In the silence, only the sound of bubbling could be heard.
All he saw were the bodies of researchers.
The glass spheres of the Fuzix Machine, which Raycis had shown through memory vision, contained various creatures.
Shirone stopped in front of one of the glass spheres.
Inside was Ikasa's body, torn to pieces as if chewed by teeth.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ikasa.
He hadn't kept his promise.
But he had to set those thoughts aside for now.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Are you satisfied now? Is this the result you wanted?
Raycis, with lips as red as blood, walked in calmly.

blocks.speaker: Raycis
blocks.content: You've trapped yourself. You shouldn't have messed with Garas.
Shirone slowly turned around.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You're in the same situation. Give up now. The command center will be shut down.

blocks.speaker: Raycis
blocks.content: Kekekeke! Do you really think that? Do you think I did this just because I was weak and longed for strength? Not at all.
Crack! Crack!
Raycis's bones twisted, and her muscles swelled like balloons.
I am already the strongest creature.
Her height grew to 2 meters, then 3 meters, until she touched the ceiling.
Her entire body was covered in red skin, with intestines-like tails tangled in bundles, and her muscular body was covered with various creatures' eyes, noses, mouths, and teeth, all moving.
An indescribable grotesqueness.
A body filled with absolute malice, unrelated to function.

blocks.speaker: Raycis
blocks.content: Shirone, become one with me.
As Raycis's androgynous voice echoed, Shirone reflexively fired a Photon Cannon.
But his target wasn't Raycis; it was the Fuzix Machine.
Boom! Boom-boom!
Raycis moved faster than the Photon Cannon, blocking the Fuzix Machine.
Despite the powerful impact, her solid body didn't budge.

blocks.speaker: Raycis
blocks.content: Raaaargh!
As Raycis spewed powerful flames, Shirone teleported to evade and countered with Armand's tendrils and Photon Cannons.
The lab turned into chaos in an instant.
Raycis didn't leave the Fuzix Machine, but even so, Shirone was the one being pushed back.
With flames and lightning mixed together, it became impossible to evade.
Raycis lunged, grabbing Shirone by the neck and slamming him against the wall.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ugh!
Without Armand, his neck would have already snapped.
Tendrils from his robe attacked, but they couldn't penetrate her skin.

blocks.speaker: Raycis
blocks.content: Kekeke, did you think you could win? Just because you're a Nephilim, the Light of Zone 73, did you think you could defeat me?

blocks.speaker: Raycis
blocks.content: I am the Incarnation of Evil, Satan!
A new consciousness invaded Shirone's mind.
In the fiery space, Satan's incarnation and Shirone's incarnation appeared, mirroring reality.
Shirone's golden wings trembled as if they would break, while Satan's grotesque face loomed closer.

blocks.speaker: Satan
blocks.content: Poor lamb, a Nephilim is no match for me.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ugh!
Shirone maximized his incarnation's power through mental transcendence.
Satan's face briefly contorted, but he soon focused his strength in his arms.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Is this how I die?
His incarnation's presence grew faint, his strength waning.
His physical body was likely on the verge of having its neck snapped.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Plu, Senior…
What was she doing now, surrounded by Garas?
